posts.text: An early indication of Vladimir Putin’s consolidation of power and authoritarian turn was the seizure and dismemberment of an oil company in the 2000s. A new book tells the tale of the legal saga that followed https://www.economist.com/culture/2026/06/18/what-the-largest-ever-shareholder-judgment-reveals-about-russia?taid=6a3821f7fbb36b00014b260c&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: BREAKING: The Iranian negotiating delegation has left the negotiation venue in Switzerland in "protest" over President Trump's threats, per Iranian state media. Iran calls the threats a violation of the June 18th Memorandum of Understanding which bars the use of threat or force.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
